description_long: This is a vintage-style lantern with a weathered, reddish metal frame and a cylindrical glass enclosure. The lantern features two sturdy vertical handles on either side, connecting the base to the top, which is capped with a rounded, vented lid. The metal surfaces show signs of rust and wear, giving it an aged, utilitarian appearance suitable for outdoor or urban environments. The glass enclosure is slightly tinted and appears to be designed to protect an internal light source, likely an oil lamp or candle. The base is wide and stable, allowing the lantern to be placed securely on flat surfaces. There are no visible decorative elements, emphasizing its functional, industrial design.
description: A weathered, reddish metal lantern with a cylindrical glass enclosure and sturdy side handles, showing signs of rust and urban wear. Its utilitarian design suggests it is built for durability and outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open face of the lantern, with the glass enclosure and both side handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the vertical handles and the rounded, vented top, with the glass enclosure partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with the handles more symmetrically aligned and the glass enclosure fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other vertical handle, with the base and top structure visible.
